question: Who killed Caesar?

question: How many gold medals did Michael Phelps win at the 2008 Olympics?

question: How many seats does the home stadium of FC Porto have?

question: Which frequent flyer program has the most airlines?

question: What was the name of the famous battle in 1836 in San Antonio?
generated_query: SELECT ?battleName WHERE { ?battle rdf:type dbo:MilitaryConflict ; dbo:place dbr:San_Antonio ; dbp:year "1836"^^xsd:gYear ; rdfs:label ?battleName . FILTER(LANG(?battleName) = "en") }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a dbo:MilitaryConflict ; dbo:place dbr:San_Antonio ; dbo:date ?date FILTER ( ?date > "1835-12-31T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime ) FILTER ( ?date <= "1836-12-31T00:00:00Z"^^xsd:dateTime ) }

question: Give me all libraries established before 1400.
generated_query: SELECT ?library WHERE { ?library rdf:type dbo:Library . ?library dbo:foundingYear ?year . FILTER(?year < "1400"^^xsd:gYear) }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Library> ; <http://dbpedia.org/property/established> ?year FILTER ( ?year < 1400 ) }

question: When was the De Beers company founded?
generated_query: SELECT ?foundingYear WHERE { dbr:De_Beers dbo:foundingYear ?foundingYear. }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT xsd:date(?date) WHERE { res:De_Beers dbo:foundingYear ?date }

question: Who is the novelist of the work a song of ice and fire?
generated_query: SELECT ?novelist WHERE { dbr:A_Song_of_Ice_and_Fire dbo:author ?novelist. ?novelist rdf:type foaf:Person. }
gold_query: PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/> SELECT ?Novelist WHERE { dbr:A_Song_of_Ice_and_Fire dbp:author ?Novelist }

question: Which beer brewing companies are located in North-Rhine Westphalia?
generated_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?company WHERE { ?company a dbo:Company ; dbo:industry dbr:Beer ; dbo:location dbr:North_Rhine-Westphalia. }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT ?company WHERE { ?company dct:subject dbc:Companies_based_in_North_Rhine-Westphalia ; rdf:type dbo:Brewery }

question: Who is the youngest player in the Premier League?
generated_query: SELECT ?player WHERE { ?player dbo:team dbr:Premier_League; dbo:birthDate ?birthDate. } ORDER BY DESC(?birthDate) LIMIT 1
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dbo:team ?team . ?league dbo:league res:Premier_League . ?league dbo:team ?team . ?uri dbo:birthDate ?date } ORDER BY DESC(?date) LIMIT 1

question: How many rivers and lakes are in South Carolina?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?river) AS ?numRivers) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?lake) AS ?numLakes) WHERE { { ?river rdf:type dbo:River . ?river dbo:location dbr:South_Carolina } UNION { ?lake rdf:type dbo:Lake . ?lake dbo:location dbr:South_Carolina } }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?uri) AS ?count) WHERE { { ?uri dbo:location dbr:South_Carolina ; rdf:type dbo:Lake } UNION { ?uri dct:subject dbc:Rivers_and_streams_of_South_Carolina } }

question: Give me the capitals of all countries in Africa.
generated_query: SELECT ?country ?capital WHERE { ?country rdf:type dbo:Country . ?country dbo:location dbr:Africa . ?country dbo:capital ?capital . }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?country dct:subject dbc:Countries_in_Africa ; dbo:capital ?uri }

question: Which bridges are of the same type as the Manhattan Bridge?
generated_query: SELECT ?bridge WHERE { dbr:Manhattan_Bridge dbo:type ?type . ?bridge dbo:type ?type . ?bridge rdf:type dbo:Bridge . FILTER(?bridge != dbr:Manhattan_Bridge) }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/> SELECT DISTINCT ?bridge WHERE { dbr:Manhattan_Bridge dbo:type ?type . ?bridge dbo:type ?type ; rdf:type dbo:Bridge }

question: How many companies were founded by the founder of Facebook?
generated_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?company) AS ?companyCount) WHERE { dbr:Facebook dbp:founder ?founder. ?company dbp:founder ?founder. ?company rdf:type dbo:Company. }
gold_query: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?x) AS ?c) WHERE { <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Facebook> <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundedBy> ?uri . ?x <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/foundedBy> ?uri }

question: Show me hiking trails in the Grand Canyon where there's no danger of flash floods.
generated_query: SELECT ?trail WHERE { ?trail rdf:type dbo:HikingTrail . ?trail dbp:location dbr:Grand_Canyon . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?trail dbp:danger "flash floods"@en } }
gold_query: SELECT DISTINCT ?uri WHERE { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/property/trailheads> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Grand_Canyon> FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?uri <http://dbpedia.org/property/hazards> <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Flash_flood> } }

question: What is the largest state in the United States?
generated_query: SELECT ?state ?area WHERE { ?state rdf:type dbo:Place ; dbo:country dbr:United_States ; dbo:area ?area . } ORDER BY DESC(?area) LIMIT 1
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri dct:subject dbc:States_of_the_United_States ; rdf:type dbo:AdministrativeRegion ; dbo:areaTotal ?area } ORDER BY DESC(?area) OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1

question: Give me the websites of companies with more than 500000 employees.
generated_query: SELECT ?company ?website WHERE { ?company rdf:type dbo:Company; dbo:numberOfEmployees ?employees; foaf:homepage ?website. FILTER(?employees > 500000) }
gold_query: PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT distinct ?web WHERE { ?sub dbo:numberOfEmployees ?obj . ?sub foaf:homepage ?web FILTER( xsd:integer(?obj) > 500000 ) . }

question: What were the names of the three ships by Columbus?
generated_query: SELECT ?shipName WHERE { ?ship dbo:wikiPageWikiLink dbr:Christopher_Columbus; rdfs:label ?shipName. FILTER(?ship IN (dbr:Santa_María_(ship), dbr:Pinta_(ship), dbr:Niña_(ship))) }
generated_execution_error:
HTTP 400: Virtuoso 37000 Error SP030: SPARQL compiler, line 2: syntax error at 'ship' before ')'

SPARQL query:
#output-format:application/sparql-results+json
SELECT ?shipName WHERE { ?ship dbo:wikiPageWikiLink dbr:Christopher_Columbus; rdfs:label ?shipName. FILTER(?ship IN (dbr:Santa_MarÃ­a_(ship), dbr:Pinta_(ship), dbr:NiÃ±a_(ship))) }
gold_query: PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/> PREFIX dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/> PREFIX dbc: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Category:> PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> SELECT ?uri WHERE { ?uri rdf:type dbo:Ship ; dct:subject dbc:Christopher_Columbus ; dct:subject dbc:Exploration_ships }
